hook.summary: A stylus solves a color-unification puzzle on a Yin-Yang symbol.
hook.visual_action: A hand uses a pen to click color dots and fill sections of a Yin-Yang shape to make it a solid color.

scene_flow: Stylus selects a red dot and fills the blue half of the Yin-Yang symbol to turn the whole circle red.
Stylus selects a blue dot and fills the red half of the Yin-Yang symbol to turn the whole circle blue.
Stylus selects a red dot and fills the small blue circle inside the red section.
Stylus selects a blue dot and fills the small red circle inside the blue section.
The puzzle resets with a new configuration as a Korean voiceover begins.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy minimalist logic puzzles and satisfying color-filling mechanics.
